text:
Coolens (クーレンズ, Kūrenzu) is a Japanese eyewear brand that held a collaboration with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released on September 18, 2014.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Hisoka Morow
Chrollo Lucilfer
